Serialized Form

  • Package rkm.project.golfgame

    • Class rkm.project.golfgame.GameInterface extends javax.swing.JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • listOfSurfacePolygons

          java.util.ArrayList<E> listOfSurfacePolygons
          List of surface polygon

        • listOfSurfaceLines

          java.util.ArrayList<E> listOfSurfaceLines
          List of surface lines

        • listOfParameters

          java.util.ArrayList<E> listOfParameters
          List of parameters (contains the number of "tracés" and the "par")

        • quadTree

          QuadTree quadTree
          Quad tree for cutting the ground into regions

        • startingPoint

          Point<T> startingPoint
          Starting point of the golf ball

        • endingPoint

          Point<T> endingPoint
          Ending point of the golf ball

        • golfBall

          GolfBall golfBall
          Golf ball

        • systemPath

          java.lang.String systemPath
          Path from user directory to program

        • path

          java.lang.String path
          Path to default golf ground

        • golfGroudPannel

          GolfGround golfGroudPannel
          Golf ground pannel

        • limitTriangleIntersections

          javax.swing.JTextField limitTriangleIntersections
          Limit of number of triangles intersections per region

        • inputXCoord

          javax.swing.JTextField inputXCoord
          Input fields for point's x coordinate

        • inputYCoord

          javax.swing.JTextField inputYCoord
          Input fields for point's y coordinate

        • inputLine1X1

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine1X1
          Input fields for line1 starting x point coordinate

        • inputLine1Y1

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine1Y1
          Input fields for line1 starting y point coordinate

        • inputLine1X2

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine1X2
          Input fields for line1 ending x point coordinate

        • inputLine1Y2

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine1Y2
          Input fields for line1 ending y point coordinate

        • inputLine2X1

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine2X1
          Input fields for line2 starting x point coordinate

        • inputLine2Y1

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine2Y1
          Input fields for line2 starting y point coordinate

        • inputLine2X2

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine2X2
          Input fields for line2 ending x point coordinate

        • inputLine2Y2

          javax.swing.JTextField inputLine2Y2
          Input fields for line2 ending y point coordinate

        • inputXCoordTargetGolfBall

          javax.swing.JTextField inputXCoordTargetGolfBall
          x coordinate of golf ball target

        • inputYCoordTargetGolfBall

          javax.swing.JTextField inputYCoordTargetGolfBall
          y coordinate of golf ball target

    • Class rkm.project.golfgame.GolfGround extends javax.swing.JPanel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • listOfPolygons

          java.util.ArrayList<E> listOfPolygons
          List of polygons that makes up the golf game

        • quadTree

          QuadTree quadTree
          Quadtree for cutting the ground into regions

        • regionContainingPoint

          QuadTree regionContainingPoint
          Region that contains the point

        • triangleContainingPoint

          Triangle triangleContainingPoint
          Triangle that contains the point

        • golfBall

          GolfBall golfBall
          Golf ball to drawn on the golf ground

        • point

          Point<T> point
          An arbitrary point for testing functions

        • stateDrawTriangles

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawTriangles
          State: draw triangles

        • stateDrawQuarterCuts

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawQuarterCuts
          State: draw quarter cuts

        • stateDrawGolfBall

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawGolfBall
          State: draw golf ball

        • stateDrawFirstTriangle

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawFirstTriangle
          State: draw first triangle in list created by triangulation

        • stateDrawRegionContainingPoint

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawRegionContainingPoint
          State: draw region containing point

        • stateDrawTriangleContainingPoint

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawTriangleContainingPoint
          State: draw triangle containing point

        • stateDrawPoint

          java.lang.Boolean stateDrawPoint
          State: draw point
